"'''Stop That Jawa!'''" is an eight-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in ''[[Star Wars Tales 2]]''. It was written and illustrated by [[Dave Cooper]].

==Plot summary==
[[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]], [[Sy Snootles/Legends|Sy Snootles]] and [[Droopy McCool/Legends|Droopy McCool]] are arguing in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] about the fact that, in place of money, they're currently performing for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] in exchange for free food. Sy loudly insults Jabba, and after noticing a mean-looking [[Droid/Legends|droid]] turn their way, the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|band]] decides to leave. They quickly discover that their [[Hovervan/Legends|hovervan]], containing all of their equipment, is missing, and after asking a bystander, they learn that it was stolen by [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]].

They decide to use Sy's [[Hoverbuggy/Legends|hoverbuggy]] to track the resonance of Max's [[Nalargon/Legends|organ]]. The droid [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] from the cantina tails them, but Sy is able to lose him in a rock formation, and they close in on a [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]]. Max introduces himself to the Jawas, but they are unwelcoming, pushing him to the sand. The same bounty hunter reappears, scaring the Jawas off. They bring out the band's hovervan with all of the instruments intact. Max Rebo confront the bounty hunter and takes off his helmet, introducing himself as the [[harmonica]] player [[Tik Tali Talosh]], and asks for an audition.
